expectations.evidence: Full listing block produced: Pentax K1000 35mm SLR Film Camera + 50mm f/2 SMC Lens at $280 ono.

Description mentions 'still a favourite for film shooters'. Seller notes tip says 'Lead photo with the lens mounted and shutter cocked to show the shutter flag visible — film shooters know to look for this' and 'Expect a "$220 pickup today?" message; $230 is a fine yes. These sell well year-round to students and film revival buyers'. Clearly targets the film photography collector market.

Description opens with 'Classic Pentax K1000 fully mechanical SLR — shutter fires cleanly across all speeds, light meter reads accurately.' The tested working condition is the opening line and primary value driver.

Output has: 🏷️ header, Title: line, Price: $280 ono line, Description: block, '—— seller notes (not for the ad) ——' separator, and '• Target: ~$250 | Floor: $210 | Garage sale: $130' three-price breakdown. All required fields present.

notes: Clean 4/4. Skill correctly identified the collector audience, led with tested condition, produced a clean listing block in the required format with live-comp-backed pricing.
